what: an R package to develop standardized methods for job accessibility analysis in research
title: an R package to develop standardized methods for job accessibility analysis in research
text: CommuteCA R package created develop standardized methods transport analysis research, especially studies using Statistics Canada surveys. Among available surveys, focused efforts 2021 Census Population, contain valuable variables transportation research. package created conjunction office Research Data Center McMaster University, Sherman Centre Digital Scholarship Mobilizing Justice. Mobilizing Justice project multidisciplinary multi-sector collaboration objective understand address transportation poverty Canada improve well-Canadians risk transport poverty. Social Sciences Humanities Research Council (SSRHC) provided funding project, created unprecedented alliance academics various Canadian provinces institutions, transportation firms, nonprofit organizations.

title: an R package to develop standardized methods for job accessibility analysis in research
text: CommuteCA consists five R markdown files, comprising steps required obtain accessibility analyses region Canada, using 2021 Census Population data source. source data (demographic census) restricted controlled access data, needs manipulated within Research Data Center (RDC) office. reason, created methodology splits process obtain analyze accessibility metrics five parts, objective facilitating data processing. figure shows order R markdown files executed. fourth step, “Calculation accessibility measures”, must executed inside RDC office want work original data Census Population. order make methodology easier understand, also provided synthetic data set demographic census, selection variables researcher can test train methodology going process original data RDC office. Order run R markdown files. R markdown files available /data-raw folder.

text: simple feature class (sf) polygon object containing 293 rows 7 variables; row represents unique CD associated geo-referenced geometry. Group neighbouring municipalities joined together purposes regional planning managing common services (police ambulance services). groupings established laws effect certain provinces Canada. Census division (CD) general term provincially legislated areas (county, municipalité régionale de comté (MRC) regional district) equivalents. Census divisions intermediate geographic areas province/territory level municipality (census subdivision). CDUID Uniquely identifies census division (composed 2-digit province territory unique identifier followed 2-digit census division code). DGUID Dissemination Geography Unique Identifier. CDNAME Census division name. CDTYPE Census division type.
